calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn For Default Prove Up Hearing And Req. To Have Witness Appear By Dec. And Have Live Testimony Waived At Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff Well Fargo Bank, N.A. a National Banking Association.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Tommy Hui.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $17,148.85
Pre-Judgment Interest and Attorney's Fees are waved.
Costs: $482.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $17,631.35
Judgment signed in open court.
